purpose: Audit the Top500 batch-0 dry ingest manifest, model-card drafts, and safety exclusions before any Lane 4 EC2 download launch request.
audit_focus: Confirm dry-manifest status is not overclaimed as downloaded, hash-verified, catalog-visible, load-tested, or generation-tested.
Review safety-term exclusions and note any false positives or missing exclusion terms.
Review license/commercial/derivative fields as captured from CSV metadata.
Confirm manifest/report/cards do not persist download URLs or secret values.
Confirm the batch is suitable as a pre-Lane-4 planning artifact only, not a launch authorization.
known_limitations: Lane 3 used local CSV metadata only; no binaries were downloaded.
EC2 free space and token-safe download execution remain unverified by Lane 3.
The batch currently includes adult/NSFW-oriented rows from the curated source and requires Lane 5 policy judgment before any downstream use.
next_owner_action_after_pass: Lane 4 may perform EC2 storage preflight and design a token-safe downloader, but should not launch downloads until audit concerns are addressed.
